title: [The Tentacled Tavern, Lounge]
description: Wall sconces made of candlelit conch shells cast a warm glow across this room.  Fishnets, strung with starfish and other seashells, decorate the modwir-paneled walls.  High half-walls surround each table, allowing the occupants conversational privacy.

wayto.199: ;e table = "azure"; fput "go #{table} table" if dothistimeout("go #{table} table", 25, /You (?:and your group )?head over to|waves.*you.*(?:invites|inviting) you(?: and your group)? to (?:join|come sit at)/) =~ /inviting you|invites you/
